name: Full project manual submittal extraction
description: Extract all submittal requirements from a bound project manual and generate Excel register (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

inputs.user_prompt: Create a complete submittal register from the Holabird Academy project specifications

expected_behavior: Locates and parses the table of contents to identify spec sections
Creates a state file and processes sections sequentially
Identifies submittal paragraphs in Part 1 of each section
Classifies each submittal by type (Product Data, Shop Drawings, Samples, etc.)
Produces a valid Excel register with all required columns
Writes a graph finding with total counts
ground_truth_notes: Manually extracted from each spec section. Columns: section_number, description, type.

section_coverage.description: Percentage of spec sections with submittals that were correctly identified

item_recall.description: Percentage of actual submittal items captured

type_accuracy.description: Percentage of items correctly classified by type

format.description: Valid xlsx with correct columns, auto-numbered submittals, summary tab
